rule.statement: All three roles (PM, design, eng) MUST attend; sessions with <3 are cancelled and rescheduled.
rule.rationale: Trio decisions made with missing role get re-litigated; cancelling forces calendar discipline.

rule.statement: Each agenda item MUST have a 10-minute hard timebox; items exceeding go to next session or async.
rule.rationale: Without timebox, one topic eats the session and others starve.

rule.statement: Each agenda item MUST name a desired outcome (decision, alignment, exploration) up front.
rule.rationale: Items without target produce theatre, not movement.

rule.statement: Every decision MUST be logged with rationale + named owner of follow-up; undocumented decisions are treated as never made.
rule.rationale: Verbal decisions are re-litigated by the next absent person.

rule.statement: Each session MUST review prior week's decisions for outcome status; absent review blocks publication.
rule.rationale: Without outcome review, decisions detach from reality.
